sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19033" key="baquka/rdios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθῠ-κάρδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of profound mind,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:222" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">222</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
